## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and new metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance showing positive trends: increased impressions, clicks, and visibility in AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [New metrics introduced: branded vs non-branded search, return direct visitors, and in-session conversions](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [E-book content received positive initial feedback, leveraging Prophecy's existing resources effectively](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Team exploring ways to better understand and optimize for AI-driven search results (Google, GPT, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Significant spike in clicks and impressions last week](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [18 articles spotlighted in LLMs, showing up for 109 keywords with 46,000 total search volume](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Branded vs non-branded impressions improving from 75/25 in February to 69/31 currently, trending towards ideal 60/40 ratio](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Return direct visitors showing higher averages post-SEO program initiation](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [8 in-session e-book downloads from GrowthX content, considered promising for early-stage performance](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

### AI Overview Optimization

  - [Prophecy content performing well in Google AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Different strategies for optimizing across platforms:](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
      - [GPT: Values brand strength](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [Perplexity: Prioritizes SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Google AI overviews: Snippet-based, favors direct answers and structured content](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

### Content Production and Performance

  - [6 articles published, 3 delivered for review, along with new e-book](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Data engineering skills article remains top performer](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Data freshness article unexpectedly entered top 10](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [LLM referrals showing more diverse content engagement across pillars](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)

### E-book Progress and Feedback

  - [Cody reviewed \~40% of e-book, anticipating approval to move forward](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Content leverages Wakefield report and avoids "fluffy" statements](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Team pleased with collaboration and depth of content](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)

### Data Analysis and Reporting

  - [Matt exploring raw search data for deeper insights](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Team discussing ways to establish easily accessible KPIs for regular monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Considering annotating data with business events for better context](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Investigate SEMrush data for additional keyword insights](https://fathom.video/share/eQc_6xjpQjt576VNs12xoPRZUmiRw1yU?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
